summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MASS INTERIORS marketing website. All 10 required features tested and working correctly including video hero, 8 solution cards, 6 portfolio cards, compare page with full functionality, smooth scroll navigation, form validation, and mobile menu.
passed_tests: Homepage hero video background playing correctly
Solutions section displays 8 cards with construction/interior images
Portfolio section displays 6 project cards with images
Compare page shows 'WHY CHOOSE CEMENT BOARD?' title
Compare page displays key advantages: Fire Safe, Moisture Proof, Termite Proof, Long Life
Compare page shows full comparison table with 5 board types (VBOARD, Gypsum, Plywood, MDF, Calcium Silicate)
Compare page carousel with prev/next navigation working
Smooth scroll navigation from hero CTAs to solutions and contact sections
Form validation shows errors for empty required fields (name, email, phone)
Mobile menu opens and closes properly with smooth animations
